suggestions.title: App.jsx is 868 lines — extract WorkerCard and ActivityLog into separate files
suggestions.description: App.jsx has grown to 868 lines. WorkerCard alone is ~150 lines. Extract WorkerCard, ActivityLog, StatsBar, and FilterControls into separate component files under src/components/. This improves maintainability and makes code review easier.

suggestions.title: React.memo missing on WorkerCard, ActivityLog, StatsBar, FilterControls
suggestions.description: CharacterAvatar and Character in Office.jsx are memoized, but the heavy components in App.jsx (WorkerCard, ActivityLog, ActivityLogEntry, StatsBar) are NOT memoized. Every 30s poll re-renders all cards even if data hasn't changed. Wrap these in React.memo with proper comparison.

suggestions.title: Confetti setTimeout has no cleanup — stacked timers cause blinking
suggestions.description: The confetti celebration effect uses setTimeout without storing the ref or cleaning up on unmount. If the component re-renders during the timeout window, multiple timers stack and the confetti blinks. Store the timeout ID in a ref and clear it in a useEffect cleanup.

suggestions.title: CSS data-tooltip invisible to keyboard-only users
suggestions.description: Tooltips use :hover CSS which keyboard users can never trigger. Add :focus-within or :focus-visible selectors alongside :hover so keyboard navigation shows the same tooltip content.

suggestions.title: ActivityLog reverses entries array on every render without useMemo
suggestions.description: In ActivityLog, `[...entries].reverse().slice(0, 20)` creates a new array every render. Wrap in useMemo keyed on entries reference.

suggestions.title: No React error boundary — render errors white-screen the app
suggestions.description: If any component throws during render, the entire app crashes to a blank white page with no recovery. Add a top-level ErrorBoundary component that catches render errors and shows a friendly fallback UI with a retry button.

suggestions.title: Office tab shows empty floor with no loading indicator on initial fetch
suggestions.description: When the page first loads, the Office tab shows an empty office floor for 1-2 seconds before workers appear. Add a subtle skeleton/loading state so it doesn't look broken.

suggestions.title: office-floor div with role='img' contains interactive children
suggestions.description: The office floor container has clickable character elements inside but is wrapped with implicit presentation semantics. Characters with onClick handlers inside role='img' creates an ARIA violation. Remove role='img' from the container or restructure.

suggestions.title: key={i} on workerHistory map in WorkerCard back face
suggestions.description: Using array index as key for the history entries in the card flip view. If the list changes, React can't track items properly. Use entry.timestamp + entry.type as key.

suggestions.title: Add a 'last deployed' timestamp visible in the UI
suggestions.description: Users can't tell when the site was last updated. Show a small 'Last deployed: Xm ago' in the footer or header, pulled from the activity.json system entries.

suggestions.title: Vibe streak crown emoji clips on small viewports
suggestions.description: The crown/fire emoji for vibe streaks can overflow its container on narrow mobile widths (<360px). Add overflow:hidden or scale the emoji down at small breakpoints.
